rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE INNOCENTE CASSOLATO TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Depositions And For Monetary Sanctions Against Cross-Respondents And Their Attorneys
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel depositions of Carol Cassolato and Jean Judnick is granted. Jean and Carol must appear for their deposition prior to July 3, 2015. The court reserves ruling on the request for sanctions. If the depositions are completed prior to July 3, 2015, no further declarations will be necessary. If no appearances occur, the Court will impose appropriate monetary and/or evidentiary sanctions. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than June 24, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE INNOCENTE CASSOLATO TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Quash Or Modify Reissued Subpoena Or In The Alternative For A Protective Order For Consumer Financial Records Requested From Non-Party Constanzo Buzzelli By Stephen Cassolato, Former Trustee; Memo Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof;And Decl Of K Schofield In Support
rulings.Rulings: Carol Cassolato's Motion to Quash or Modify Reissued Subpoena is granted. The subpoena is procedurally defective because Stephen failed to comply with CCP Sections 1985.3 and 2020.510(c). The subpoena further violates Carol's constitutional right to privacy and is overbroad in scope and time. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order along with any declaration supporting all reasonable attorney's fees incurred to date. The proposed order shall have a sentence with the attorney's fees to be awarded left blank. Any party choosing to contest the tentative must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 6/24/15, at 4:00 p.m.
